Musician Application Form Template

Address *

Instrument(s) & Vocal Skills

e.g. guitar, piano, drums

Education & Training

e.g. degrees, certifications, music schools

How proficient are you with music software, recording equipment, or audio editing tools?
What is your experience with live sound engineering or studio recording?
Drag & Drop Files, Choose Files to Upload
Clear Signature
pro
This template includes features available in WPForms Pro. Compare Plans

Are you wanting to accept applications for a musician directly from your website? If so, then you need the Musician Application Form Template from WPForms.

Using our Musician Application Form Template saves time, ensures consistency, and helps you make informed decisions when selecting musicians.

What Goes Onto a Musician Application Form Template?

On our template, we first cover the applicant’s details with these fields:

  • Name
  • Date of Birth
  • Email
  • Phone
  • Address

Then, the form requests information about instruments the applicant plays and their vocal skills. This portion includes the following fields:

  • Instrument(s) played (e.g. guitar, piano, drums)
  • Vocal range and style (e.g. soprano, tenor, pop, jazz)

Next, our template offers three large text boxes for the applicant to describe their education and training. In this section, users will find these fields:

  • Music education (e.g. degrees, certifications, music schools)
  • Private lessons or workshops attended
  • Relevant music-related courses or workshops completed

The applicant will then provide details in three more large text boxes, this time covering their performance experience. Here, applicants will type in the boxes for the following fields:

  • Bands or ensembles previously performed with
  • Solo performances
  • Music competitions or festivals participated in

Then, the form asks about the applicant’s proficiency with music software, recording equipment, or audio editing tools. Applicants check a box for:

  • Beginner
  • Novice
  • Expert

The form also asks the applicant to rate their experience with live sound engineering or studio recording by using the same descriptions.

Finally, applicants may upload an audio or video sample with their application, and are prompted to link their website or YouTube channel. They will then enter their signature and submit the form.

Get started with WPForms today to create and customize your own Musician Application Form. Signing up with WPForms gives you access to this and hundreds of other pre-made templates.

Our form templates let you create any kind of WordPress form in a few clicks.

You can select any template to view the demo and try it out. If it works for you, you can import it and publish it in minutes. Each WPForms template is fully customizable too. Our drag and drop form builder makes it easy to adapt any template to fits your business’ needs. When you use our form templates, you can easily:

  • Import Any Template With 1 Click

    Ready to get started? Import any form template and start customizing it right away.

  • Add or Remove Fields

    Use our simple drag and drop form builder to add fields, delete them, or move them around.

  • Customize Notification Settings

    It’s easy to edit the notification emails on any template with your own text or smart tags.

  • Change the Confirmation Message

    Easily display a custom message after submission – or forward your visitor to another page.

  • Change the Field Labels

    Click on a field and change the text to collect the exact information you need.

  • Change the Notification Email

    Add CCed recipients and multiple notifications so you never miss an entry.

  • Customize the Submit Button

    Adapt the words on the button and change the color so that it matches your theme.

  • Publish Your Form With Ease

    Hit publish — that's it! WPForms makes it easy to get your forms online without writing code.

  • Get Instant Form Insights

    Track form submissions with our built-in analytics to see how your forms perform.

WPForms makes it easy to publish forms on any post or page. You can also publish your forms in the WordPress sidebar or footer. And because we integrate with page builders, you can easily make an Elementor contact form, or publish any form on a landing page in SeedProd.
